description: Observed startup surfaces for the hulk harness. This file is derived from reading the codebase — it does not define startup behavior. The code is the source of truth; this is a frozen snapshot for audit and diffing.

phases.name: runtime-config
phases.description: Settings read by the Claude Code runtime before any context is injected. These files govern which other surfaces get loaded (autoMemoryDirectory, permissions, voice).

phases.name: root
phases.description: Files read by the runtime before any harness-specific logic. AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md are injected by the Claude Code harness; .docc/index.md is read by the startup CLI.

phases.name: environment
phases.description: Operator environment profile and workspace contract. Read during $sync and referenced by the startup CLI for header rendering.

phases.name: harness-bootstrap
phases.description: Hulk carrier-level surfaces. AGENTS.md defines the 8-file bootstrap ceremony. .docc/ holds the carrier contract and DocC root.

phases.name: agent-persona
phases.description: Claude persona surfaces loaded after the carrier bootstrap. The 8-file bootstrap ceremony plus the memory.md compat pointer.

surfaces.note: Compat pointer to memory/.docc/. Loaded by carrier as bootstrap slot 8.

phases.name: identity
phases.description: Commissioned identity artifacts read during $sync profile reload.

phases.name: auto-memory
phases.description: Persistent auto-memory loaded by Claude Code from settings.json autoMemoryDirectory (~/.claude/memory/.docc). The MEMORY.md index is always loaded; individual memory files are loaded on relevance.

surfaces.note: Always loaded. 107 entries. Truncated at 200 lines by Claude Code.

phases.note: Individual memory files under ~/.claude/memory/.docc/ are loaded on demand when relevant. The MEMORY.md index is the guaranteed startup cost.

phases.name: incident
phases.description: Active incident file, read when present. Conditional — only contributes tokens when an incident is active.

phases.name: background-memory
phases.description: Files listed in CLAUDE.md Background Memory section. Read silently at session start, never surfaced to the user. These belong to a different commissioned home (clia-carrie).
phases.note: Cross-home dependency: these surfaces are owned by clia-carrie, not by hulk or claude. Growth in clia-carrie's memory increases hulk's startup cost without any change to hulk's own surfaces.

phases.name: skills
phases.description: Skill directories declared to the Claude Code runtime. Not injected into context at startup — loaded on demand when invoked. The skill index contributes to the system-reminder listing.
phases.note: 34 skill directories, 2.9 MB on disk. Skill names and descriptions are injected as a system-reminder listing at session start (~2K tokens estimated). Actual skill content is loaded only on invocation.

phases.name: cli-startup
phases.description: Output produced by swift-harness-environment-cli startup run. This is generated content, not a file read.

commands.note: Reads .docc/index.md, renders header, pulls minimized mono profile.

summary.note: Token estimates use bytes/4 heuristic. Actual count depends on model tokenizer. Guaranteed total excludes the conditional incident phase and on-demand skill/memory loads. Auto-memory MEMORY.md is the single largest guaranteed surface at ~5.2K tokens.
